sql:
SELECT "p"."Name", SUM("s"."LineTotal") AS "TotalRevenue"
FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail" "s"
JOIN "Production"."Product" "p" ON "s"."ProductID" = "p"."ProductID"
GROUP BY "p"."Name"
ORDER BY "TotalRevenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;
query_text: Show me the top 10 best-selling products by total revenue.

sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate") AS "Year", 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate") AS "Month", 
    SUM("Sales"."SalesOrderDetail"."LineTotal") AS "TotalSalesRevenue"
FROM 
    "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"
INNER JOIN 
    "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."SalesOrderID" = "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail"."SalesOrderID"
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate"), 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate")
ORDER BY 
    "Year", 
    "Month";
query_text: What is the total sales revenue by year and month?

sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate") AS "Year", 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate") AS "Month", 
    SUM("Sales"."SalesOrderDetail"."UnitPrice" * "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail"."OrderQty") AS "TotalSalesRevenue"
FROM 
    "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"
INNER JOIN 
    "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."SalesOrderID" = "Sales"."SalesOrderDetail"."SalesOrderID"
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate"), 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."OrderDate")
ORDER BY 
    "Year", 
    "Month";
query_text: What is the total sales revenue by year and month?

query_text: What is the total sales revenue by year and month?

SELECT "JobTitle", AVG("SickLeaveHours") AS "AverageSickLeaveHours" 
FROM "HumanResources"."Employee" 
GROUP BY "JobTitle"
query_text: What is the average sick leave hours by job title?

sql:
SELECT "t2"."CountryRegionName", SUM("t1"."SubTotal") AS "TotalSalesAmount" 
FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader" "t1" 
JOIN "Sales"."SalesTerritory" "t3" ON "t1"."TerritoryID" = "t3"."TerritoryID" 
JOIN "Person"."CountryRegion" "t2" ON "t3"."CountryRegionCode" = "t2"."CountryRegionCode" 
GROUP BY "t2"."CountryRegionName"
query_text: Show me total sales amount by sales territory country.

sql:
SELECT "v"."Name", SUM("p"."SubTotal") AS total_spent
FROM "Purchasing"."Vendor" "v"
JOIN "Purchasing"."PurchaseOrderHeader" "p" ON "v"."BusinessEntityID" = "p"."VendorID"
GROUP BY "v"."Name"
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 5;
query_text: Which top 5 vendors do we spend the most money with?

FROM "Production"."Product" "p"
JOIN "Production"."ProductSubcategory" "psc" ON "p"."ProductSubcategoryID" = "psc"."ProductSubcategoryID"
GROUP BY "psc"."Name"
query_text: Show me the total inventory quantity grouped by product subcategory.

sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."SalesOrderNumber" LIKE 'SO%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Online Orders",
    SUM(CASE WHEN "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"."SalesOrderNumber" LIKE 'ST%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "In-Store Orders"
FROM 
    "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader"
query_text: Show me the number of orders placed online versus in-store.

sql:
SELECT "p"."FirstName", "p"."LastName", SUM("soh"."SubTotal") AS "TotalSales"
FROM "Sales"."SalesOrderHeader" "soh"
JOIN "Sales"."SalesPerson" "sp" ON "soh"."SalesPersonID" = "sp"."BusinessEntityID"
JOIN "Person"."Person" "p" ON "sp"."BusinessEntityID" = "p"."BusinessEntityID"
GROUP BY "p"."FirstName", "p"."LastName"
ORDER BY "TotalSales" DESC
LIMIT 5;
query_text: Who are the top 5 sales representatives by total sales, and what were their total sales?

sql:

JOIN "Person"."Person"p ON "sp"."BusinessEntityID" = "p"."BusinessEntityID"

ORDER BY "TotalSales" DESC
